ratings.comment: She is really sweet and very passionate about what she teaches, but the lectures are a bit boring and wordy. I would recommend going to class because there's stuff on the tests that she doesn't put on the slides.

She teaches the agro 340 lecture/lab class. Lectures consist of wordy slides which she puts online. Attendance isnt necessary to pass but, it being a small class she may notice. Best part of the class is the labs. She splits the class up for lab so their actually only 1/2 the scheduled time. Test are straight off the slides & don't need the book.
